rows.notes: Clear printed year at top of page, no monetary columns present on this line.

rows.description: Domus Fund. Payments on acct of
rows.notes: Clear heading directly beneath the year; no amounts on the same line.
Numbers (1 3 2) are well aligned in the three narrow right-hand columns (pounds, shillings, pence). Clear handwriting; values valid.

The right-hand columns show two digits (1 and 8) with the pounds column empty — interpreted as 0 pounds, 1 shilling, 8 pence. The handwriting of the '1' in the shillings column is slightly light but alignment with column lines supports this reading.
Same visual pattern as previous line: only two numerals visible in the shilling and pence columns (1 and 8). Interpreted as 0 pounds, 1 shilling, 8 pence; handwriting clarity moderate.
Clear numerals '18' and '4' in the shillings and pence columns; pounds column empty. Shillings (18) within valid range. Description reading moderately clear.
Three clear digits in pounds, shillings, pence columns (4 12 6). Alignment with ruling lines is unambiguous; values valid.
Shillings and pence (8 and 2) are clear in the two right columns with pounds blank, interpreted as 0 pounds, 8s, 2d. Minor ink variation on the dash/abbreviation but numbers are legible.
Clear '12' and '6' in shillings and pence columns; pounds column empty. Interpreted as 12s 6d.

The description handwriting is somewhat uncertain (spelling ambiguous). The numeric '10' sits in the shillings column; no pence shown. Interpreted as 10s 0d. Lower confidence due to unclear wording of description.
Description partially abbreviated; numbers '2' and '2' appear in shillings and pence columns. Alignment consistent but the handwriting of the description is not crisp.
This line appears as a sub-note under the previous designation (indented) and no amounts are shown on the same line. Treated as an entry (sub-item) with no amounts.
Section heading for subsequent numeric lines. Clear placement and no amounts on this heading line itself.
Numeric line under 'Vicario Weston' clearly shows '31.13.9' aligned in the pounds/shillings/pence columns. Values within valid ranges.
Second identical numeric line; clear alignment and digits.
Numeric line clearly reads 31 (pounds), 16 (shillings), 5 (pence); alignment confirms columns.
Fourth similar numeric line; clear and aligned.

Summation appears at right as '127 0 4' (checked against the four preceding lines of 31.13.9, 31.13.9, 31.16.5, 31.16.5). Clear alignment; description on page is blank/just a tick mark, so description field left empty.
Section header (spelling slightly uncertain but legible). No amounts on this header line.

Numeric '19.10' appears; interpretation as 19 pounds, 10 shillings is plausible given alignment with prior pounds-column numbers. However the entry's dot/period formatting and column alignment are less distinct here, so confidence reduced.

Description 'Candy' followed by '8.12.4 1/2' aligned in the three money columns; the final small loop/mark after the pence is interpreted as 'ob' (halfpenny) => 0.5. Handwriting of fraction is a little faded but recognizable.
Line reads 'Colby 10 17 1/2'. Interpreted as 10 pounds, 17 shillings, 1 1/2 pence (1d + halfpenny). The fraction is faint but looks like a halfpenny loop. Moderate confidence due to fraction clarity.
Clearly shows '26 18 6' with a small loop after the pence interpreted as a halfpenny (0.5). Alignment is consistent with pounds/shillings/pence columns. Fraction visibility moderate.
A repeated numeric line (no leading text), matching the previous Colby-style line. The digits are legible but slightly fainter; interpreted same as previous: 26lb, 18s, 6½d.
Subtotal at right reads '53 17 1'. It visually aligns as the subtotal for the Colby group above. Clear numerals; description position on page is blank so left empty here.
Section heading 'Insurances' clearly visible and introduces a block of insurance-related entries beneath.
Text partially abbreviated but readable; amount at right reads '7 13 7' (7lb 13s 7d). Columns are aligned and digits are clear.
Amount reads '1 1 8' (1lb 1s 8d). Description abbreviation 'to do.' aligns with the insurance grouping; digits clear.
Amount clearly reads '34 11 1' aligned in pounds/shillings/pence. Description is legible.
Right-hand shows '1 3' (no pence digit visible) interpreted as 1 pound 3 shillings 0 pence. The description is abbreviated but readable.
Shows '3 7' in the right columns; interpreted as 3lb 7s 0d. Small gap where pence would be but consistent with other lines showing only two numbers.
Clear '1 7 3' visible in the three columns. Description reading is moderately clear.
Right-hand shows '1 5' (no pence digit visible) — interpreted as 1 pound 5 shillings 0 pence. The descriptor is somewhat abbreviated; moderate confidence.
Reads '1 8' in the right-hand columns; interpreted as 1lb 8s 0d. The descriptor is abbreviated and the pence column appears blank so pence set to 0.
Right-hand clearly shows '1 6 3'. Description legible though slightly cramped.
Clear numerals '4 12 6' in the three money columns; description legible.
Clear '6 5 6' visible; description appears as 'Chapel & Mid - 1870' — confident reading.
Shows '20' aligned in the pounds column with shillings/pence blank — interpreted as £20 0s 0d. Description legible.
Description contains an interest calculation; the right-hand amount reads '7 4 6'. Handwriting of descriptor slightly cramped but numbers are clear.

Shows '6 6' in the left-most of the right columns and the far-right pence column appears blank — interpreted as £6 6s 0d (common subscription amount). The handwriting is fairly clear but pence column blank introduces slight uncertainty.
Right-hand shows '5 5' (interpreted as 5 pounds 5 shillings). Pence column blank; digits clear.
Line reads 'Little Tev. Do' (abbreviation uncertain) with a single '6' at right. Interpreted as £6 0s 0d but the descriptor and exact placement of the single '6' make this less certain.
The word 'Curate' appears with '15' to the right. Interpreted as £15 0s 0d. The handwriting of the figure is clear but the association with 'Curate' (line break/indentation) is moderately ambiguous.
Clear '3 3' visible; interpreted as £3 3s 0d. Description legible.
Clear '5 5' in the right-hand columns; interpreted as £5 5s 0d. Description legible.
Final line at bottom right reads '371 4 8' and is labeled 'Carried over'. Clear alignment and numerals; high confidence.
